ddls:
CREATE TABLE "peaks" (
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peak */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the peak */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the peak in meters */,
  "prominence" INTEGER /* Prominence of the peak in meters */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the peak is located */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the peak image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the peak */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the peak */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the peak */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Estimated difficulty level of the climb (1-5) */,
  "last_climbed" TEXT /* The last date the peak was climbed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peaks_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peak the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "storage_path" TEXT /* Path to the image in storage */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_peak_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_id") REFERENCES peaks ("peak_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, contributor, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peak being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty rating (1-5) */,
  "scenery" INTEGER /* Scenery rating (1-5) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience rating (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the user about the rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_peak_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_id") REFERENCES peaks ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peak being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_peak_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_id") REFERENCES peaks ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Average elevation of the location */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peak_images" (
  "peak_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peak image */,
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peak the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the image */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peak_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peak_images_peak_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_id") REFERENCES peaks ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peak_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
